entry.title: Re: Enabling the CFL custom fields with F4 help using SCFD_EUI transaction from SAP GUI
entry.content: I was too fast. It's working now!

entry.title: Re: Asset transfer ABUMN - partial transfer of wrongly ad...
entry.content:
Dear @beam_liang @SAPSupport 

Related to my question below, would it be possible to use manual posting to do this transfer ?

Thanks for your reply.

entry.title: Crystal Reports 2020 VS2019 Windows Server 2022 IIS
entry.content:
Hello, I have a Windows Server 2022 running IIS, Crystal Reports 2020, VS2019.

I am publishing some Crystal Reports and I getting the a blank screen with 
TypeError: bobj.isObject is not a function error 

I have DotNet 4.8 and CR Runtime 34 64bit installed

My Web.Config

<configuration>
<system.webServer>
<handlers>
<add name="CrystalImageHandler.aspx_GET"
verb="GET" path="CrystalImageHandler.aspx"
type="CrystalDecisions.Web.CrystalImageHandler, CrystalDecisions.Web, Version=13.0.4000.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=692fbea5521e1304"
preCondition="integratedMode"/>
</handlers>
<validation validateIntegratedModeConfiguration="false" />
</system.webServer>
<system.web>
<compilation debug="false" strict="false" explicit="true">
<assemblies>
<add assembly="CrystalDecisions.Web, Version=13.0.4000.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=692FBEA5521E1304"/>
<add assembly="CrystalDecisions.Shared, Version=13.0.4000.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=692FBEA5521E1304"/>
<add assembly="CrystalDecisions.ReportSource, Version=13.0.4000.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=692FBEA5521E1304"/>
<add assembly="CrystalDecisions.CrystalReports.Engine, Version=13.0.4000.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=692FBEA5521E1304"/>

 

 

 Any help will be very much appreciated.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Error with webdynpro \CLASS=CL_WD_MATRIX_HEAD_DATA an...
entry.content:
Hi gurus,

I am facing the same issue ... any solution for this ¿?

Thank you in advance.

Rubén.

entry.title: Re: Processing 944 IDOCs with multiple error lines
entry.content: If you are referring to IDoc WMMBXY for inbound goods movement posting it does in fact attempt to process all lines for goods movement in one LUW. However, it does not give a list of errors because the function is interrupted on the first error as is standard behavior in SAP (and should be). It is up to the sender to provide proper data that can be translated accordingly and posted to the system accurately.

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 1 - Setup
entry.content:
Hi,

Here is my submission

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to set filter values using URL Paramet...
entry.content:
Thank you for the suggestion.  This works as expected for single-value parameters. Is there a way also to pass operators such as less than or greater than?

Also, if a date range needs to be set, what format should be followed?
I tried a couple of different formats and the application always took the first date and ignores the second date. So it becomes for example, 01.01.2020 - 01.01.2020 instead of 01.01.2020 - 31.12.2020

entry.title: Re: Use Persona Flavor for SQ01 for Fiori
entry.content:
Hi, 

make sure the following is in configuration of slipstream navigation plugin:

ICF Path: /sap/bc/se/m/script/sap/se/shell/plugins/navigation
SAP UI5 Component ID: sap.se.shell.plugins.navigation

Best Regards!

entry.title: Re: How to get the Access key & Secret key for AWS to cre...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

There is a new URL, so please refer to this one https://youtu.be/6I07Q32Mfj8 

For more information, see also https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/cloud-appliance-library

Best regards,

Tsvetinka

entry.title: Re: SAP Process Intelligence Imports not separating Activ...
entry.content:
Hi CLThomas, 

thank you for reaching out with this issue regarding importing into SAP Signavio Process Intelligence. Unfortunately this specific case has to be investigated further to see if there is an issue with the csv file you created or if the system is not behaving as expected. 

We thus kindly ask you to create a support ticket via SAP For Me!

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now recording for SAP WEBGUI running really slow

Hi @Anton_Mavrin,

Windows will default to a zoom size of 150% for a lot of users - is this a problem for recording projects?

Thanks,

Andrew

S100Coffee PowerGms1051520

entry.title: Re: How to Use 'document-service' API to Upload Documents into Sales & Service Cloud Version 2
entry.content: @Saurabh_Kabra : As of now, it is a multistep process whether you do it manually or programmatically.

entry.title: Re: The limit of parallel sessions is reached ADT
entry.content:
After you complete your debugging session, in the debug panel you will get an option called Terminated. Try to right click and select Terminate/Disconnect All. That might work.

Thanks and Regards,

Pannaga Hegde

entry.title: Re: The RFC does not receive the values passed in when ca...
entry.content: Thank you very much, Thomas.

entry.title: Re: Project Cost Prediction
entry.content:
Hi Support,

While I tried to run the prediction, error below shows. 
We successfully run the "Predict Cost" before but seems it does not work now. 

Any idea what should I check to fix this issue?

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA for group reporting: tighter accounting integration with Group Reporting Preparation
entry.content:
Hi @tomasoldrich , 

Downside of that is that the annual corrections (accountant corrections) in period 13-16 are still released to period 12 in fiscal year 2024. That is not favourable, as period 12 was already reported to a shareholder. I will try to solve that useing a restatement version. 

 

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud for Utilities foundation, or the Measurement Concept Management
entry.content:
Hi @JelisavetaN ,

Thanks for your great blog post!

I have a question about MCM together with Event Mesh / EMIS and Event broker.

- We have the licence for MCM on Subaccount1. We do NOT have a licence for the integration suite (and therefore no advanced EM). The 'old' Event Mesh service is not available anymore. Also, the Event broker service is not available on this subaccount.

- On Subaccount2 we subscribed to the old version of SAP event mesh, which is up and running.

 

My questions are:

For a non-productive purpose, would you recommend using the old EM service?

If you don't have the old EM available or if setup new and used productive  - is the only option to buy both MCM and Integration Suite (including advanced Event Mesh)

Best regards

Till

entry.title: SAC Validation Rules should be checked while running Data Actions
entry.content:
Hi All,

in my model I set one Validation Rule (I'm currently using the one with Existing Attributes) to allow data changes only for certain combinations of CCs and KFs.

What I found is that Validation rules are checked only for Manual Input or while trying to publish some data. But What about Data actions? For instance, if a run a Data Action with an Allocation step, I was expecting that my amount would be distributed only on the allowed combinations. But it is allocating for all the combinations. Only when I publish allocated numbers, data on not allowed combinations are not published: but total amount won't be my initial aggregated numbers that I need to allocate.

Any solution for my problem?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Trigger creation of delivery documents in SAP TM
entry.content:
Is it possible that TM does not combine deliveries for planned freight units?

I have a seafreight booking. I split the quantity into 2 containers. For each container I create a pick-up freight order. Now I need for each freight order a single delivery, but the delivery proposal combines them into one delivery (with 2 items). 

 

 

Thanks for your support!

entry.title: Re: SAP Data Warehouse Cloud - Can't load Data from Spaces
entry.content:
Hello there , what was the conclusion?

We are receiving this in our Datasphere systems after upgrade.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Planning - Validation Rules
entry.content:
Hi Gajendra,

Thanks for sharing the post. Very Interesting.

I have noticed that validation rules are checked only with manual input or while trying to publish data. But what about Data Actions results? Why Validation rules are not checked during Data Action calculations? Am I missing any settings?

I tried with a simple copy step - it is copying everything.

I tried with an Allocation step - it is allocating also on not allowed combinations. Even if when I copy only data on allowed combinations are published, my total allocated amount is not the one desired.

Thank you

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
Hi Mike, @pokrakam ,

Yes, this is a good spot. We will sync RZ10 to the profile.

But as you say: In the next version.

Thanks and best wishes,

Julie.

entry.title: Re: Shared contract
entry.content: Hi Eric! contract 27 and 26 linked to the contract 20 (where the shared allowance was created) Activating the contract 27 the logic is running with data belonged to the contract 26. I used the No Access component to "debug" the recurring rate execution to understand what was doing wrong...

entry.title: Can't load Data from Spaces - System down
entry.content:
Hello all, 

Are we the only ones reciving issues like "spaces couldn’t be loaded" since last system refresh  ( 16th Sun 24) ?

We can not reach the system / find view files or do any intervention.

entry.title: Call API on Presentation Server using CL_HTTP_CLIENT
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there the possibility of consuming an API exposed on my local machine (Presentation Server) using the CL_HTTP_CLIENT class (or another method if it exists)?
SAP is accessed using SAP Gui, and the connection can be made with SAP Router or not. Due to this, there is a possibility that my machine is not on the same network that Application Server, which I imagine rules out the possibility of direct access via IP.
The exposed API communicates with local devices (USB), which makes it impossible for the API to be placed on a server.
Each user will access SAP from their own machine, and the API will be exposed on each of them.

Regards,
Miguel Motta

entry.title: Re: add/ read attachments of freight order
entry.content: That's what we are doing but it's a complicated and time-consuming process so I hoped for specific hints or even code-snippets...

entry.title: Re: Is webdynpro application development outdated?
entry.content:
It seems that WBD will continue with us for a long time.

Please join us on the topic of the WEBD future...

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-architecture-discussions/webdynpro-what-is-the-future-of-the-product/m-p/13735302#M413

entry.title: Re: SAP Stammtisch Hannover - Format
entry.content: Wir arbeiten dran und sehen zu, dass die Infos hier irgendwo ersichtlich werden.

entry.title: Re: Call API on Presentation Server using CL_HTTP_CLIENT
entry.content:
Via CL_HTTP_CLIENT, if you use the RFC connection "SAPHTTP", it will access the Web through the HTTP interface on the user's laptop (through the SAP GUI "saphttp" program), as opposed to "SAPHTTPA" which corresponds to the HTTP interface on the ABAP server.

RFC connection "SAPHTTP" (SM59):

SAPHTTPA:

entry.title: Re: With SAP Quartz Dark Theme when I open a Message in B...
entry.content:
Hello,
this is an application issue.

The general topic is explained in SAP Note
2930005 - Quartz Dark: Text in HTML Control is displayed with black font on dark gray background
And this note links to the note for SBWP as well: 2950674

Best regards,
Frank

entry.title: Mass update
entry.content:
Dear all,

Could you please help with the materials mass update (ERP/WP1) in the classification tab (recommend storage statement field)?

I don't have a template available for the LSMW transaction.

Do you know where I can find them?

Many thanks,

Bárbara

entry.title: SAP Crypto DLL filling disk space
entry.content:
Hi, 

We have recently upgraded to SAP B1 FP2405. 

Now we find that a certain directory is being filled every 30secs with a DLL file from SAP. It's chewed up 150GB+ in a few days. 

What could be causing this?

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI options configuration file editable versus re...
entry.content:
Hello Sandra,

unfortunately, you cut off the screenshots.
These files are read-only for example if you define the SAP UI Landscape file via an environment variable.
If you set for example:
set SAPLOGON_LSXML_FILE=C:\Users\<User Name>\AppData\Roaming\SAP\Common\SAPUILandscape.xml
SAP Logon will consider this the central landscape file and disable the respective fields.

So, I would check the environment variables.

Best regards,
Frank

entry.title: Re: add/ read attachments of freight order
entry.content: And in the other tables (TOA01, etc.)

entry.title: Re: Message "'UI Update' has encountered a problem." appears often while debugging in ADT
entry.content: We strongly recommend to not use DevStyle / Darkest Dark Theme together with ADT, as the way how it works is very invasive and we cannot guarantee the functionality in combination with ADT. Can you please try to reproduce the issue using an installation without DevStyle?

entry.title: Re: Secure your LLM: Consuming SAP Generative AI deployments in a Simple Python App
entry.content:
Hi,  Yes you can add authentication to this.

You need to add a uaa service and an app router.

The code also needs to be tweaked inspired by:

https://github.com/gradio-app/gradio/issues/2790

I have a version of that running, drop me an internal email and I will share.  I've not had a chance to tidy it up for public consumption.

entry.title: Re: All permission removed after adding common super doma...
entry.content:
Hello,

we also experienced this behavior with the new RBP Ui but when changing permissions in general not necessarily in regards to common super domain. Also we experienced that the changed permissions were shown as saved but did not reflect in the respective portlet. When changing to the old Ui the permissions were not saved, as previously shown in the new UI. It seams to be a bug with the new Ui.

entry.title: Re: Can we automate SAP GUI MRS Planning board Gantt Chat...
entry.content:
Hi,

the netchart and barchart controls in SAP GUI for Windows only have a quite small scripting API.
See:
https://help.sap.com/docs/sap_gui_for_windows/b47d018c3b9b45e897faf66a6c0885a8/641f6b2c44164366ad580e4e196b7225.html
https://help.sap.com/docs/sap_gui_for_windows/b47d018c3b9b45e897faf66a6c0885a8/d47a106b196445248fee853dfed41dab.html

I doubt that a useful test can be implemented based on this, but you can try.
And there is no other tool that could help you, because every automation tool would need the scripting API to interact with these components.

Best regards,
Frank

entry.title: Re: APIs for VTBSTC1 (Standing Instructions Payment Details), VTBSTA1 (SI Assignments), VTBSTA2 (SI
entry.content:
I have found this thread while looking to sync HR-Data to BP.

We are able to create a BP with vendor-role from HR automatically.

Now we want to create the customer-role.

In ERP we did this by using CALL METHOD cmd_ei_api=>maintain_bapi

I have found the cvi_ei_adapter=>start_inbound_main_single but have no idea how to fill the importstructures to get the customer-role stored correctly.

Can somebody provide help?

with best regards and thank you in advance

Tim Brandes

entry.title: SAP Inside Track PORTO 2024
entry.content:
SAP Inside Track PORTO will have it first edition in PORTO (Portugal) on September 28, 2024.

Look here in the SAP Community Event Calendar.

The event is present in several countries around the world. Its organizers are active members of the SAP Community with the aim of sharing knowledge and strengthening professionals among the participants.

The event has been in existence for over 15 years and has been held in several cities around the world.

Learn more about how to hold your SAP Inside Track event in your city through this LINK.

Inscription:

Includes:

  • Access to the event;
  • Access to all the lectures;
  • Candidates can be received to participate as a volunteer of the event;
  • Admissions to the event, here in the Link 

 

Speaker:

Take this opportunity to share your knowledge and help us make this event even better.

Applications for lectures can be made at this LINK

    • A proposal with the title theme and a synopsis should be sent with the subject SITPOR
    • The lecture time is a maximum of 40 minutes.
    • The last day for submitting proposals is  Aug  25, 2024.
    • Wait for the contact of our team until Aug 30 with confirmation.

Event’s place

The Lodge Hotel

Rua Serpa Pinto, 60 - 4400-307 V. N. Gaia – Porto

On September 28 2024  (Saturday)

 

Agenda

8 am – Reception

9 am to 12 pm – Presentations / lectures

12h to 13:30 – Lunch

14h to 17:30 – Lectures

17:30 to 18:00 – Closing session

Speakers:

Lecture NameSpeaker
SAP Project: Technology or business?António Andrade
SAP Build Work Zone Content Federation deep diveFabio Pagoti
Global eCompliance with SAP Document and Reporting ComplianceFelipe Borges
SAP Implementation Change Management how to manage organizations and peopleMarta Mota
SAP in Industry 4.0Tiago Fernandes
Gen AIBruno Costa
The era of Digitalization and SustainabilityFilipe Silva
SAP IS RetailAndré Margi

 

Organization Team

Manuel Robalinho ( @MRobalinho )
Arnaldo Calçada
Pedro Rodrigues
Pedro Marques
Pedro Vieira
Fátima Linhares
Matheus Brasil  
António Elias
 
Aditional informations and Contacts:
Email: SAPInsideTrackPorto@gmail.com

entry.title: Re: Total Cost Commitment in CN41N report
entry.content:
Hi @Shahzad_Ahmed 

Do the G/L accounts used in the purchase document have a cost element? Did they exist before the creation of the purchase document?

Try executing the CJEN transaction to restructure the RPSCO table of the project.

Regards,
Marcio Blos

entry.title: Re: ClientId of Document Extraction inside SAP Process Automation
entry.content: After a lot of googling the answer from @sabarna17 worked for me. Thanks!!!

entry.title: Re: A cycle is found in the calculation chain of the key...
entry.content:
Hi @AndreiLupu 

I tried to simplify your calculation to avoid the cycles as much as possible not only in IBP, but also in Excel. I think there is a flaw in the way you presumed the calculation of KF2 and KF3 as they overlap each other in the future. Hence the calculation will stop either at KF2 or KF3. We simply can't get rid of this overlapping error. 

Can you re-validate your solution once again? 

Best Regards,

Riyaz

entry.title: Re: Recalculate depreciation S/4 Hana Cloud public
entry.content: Hi Mark, I have the same issue and then I followd your guidance but it's still not calculating depreciation for 12/2024 period.

entry.title: Re: SAP Group Reporting - Different Consolidation Methods...
entry.content:
Big Thanks Florian_Roll. I agree on your recommendations.

For the option to create a different Consolidation Group but a different version needs to be use for Statutory and Management Consolidation, reason is for Management Consolidation although they will be using Proportionate Method but they want to have the flexibility the change Ownership Rate not the same as what they maintain for the Statutory Consolidation.

For example if in Statutory Consolidation Conso Unit A is 80% ownership, but for Management Conso Unit A will be 100% ownership.

entry.title: Re: Schedule recurring processes on discrete dates, if no...
entry.content:
Hi @vincentverheyen ,

Recurring Process in meant for scheduled in terms of a specific periodicity. Ideally IBP's Process Management Feature supports Process Schedule for Recurring and One-Time Processes.

If you're sure about the discrete days in which you want the process to be scheduled, then schedule them as one-time process for those discrete days. 

Best Regards,

Riyaz

entry.title: Curriculum with item completion and retraining
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Need support

Suppose we have a curricula with 2 items.. say Item A and Item B. Item A should be completed by users immediately and Item B should be completed every 2 years. 

Scenario is if users forgets to complete item B within the 2 years time, then they have to retake the item A followed by Item B

 

Difficulties faced : As users might have completed item A earlier, so system is not recognising the above scenarios. 

Thank you. 

SAP SuccessFactors Learning

entry.title: Re: Incoming payment from a multi-currencues BP
entry.content: thanks for the help narayanis. this will help when the open documents was in the same currency I guess. but if the open documents was in usd, egy, euro .. the total amount in the payment means will be calculated based on which exchange currency ? usd, eurp ??

entry.title: Re: Truck is stuck at the gate for 1 hour
entry.content: @Tomas_Buryanek, wished to react a burst out laugh to your meme. But commenting here: 🤣🤣

entry.title: Re: Change Homepage on SAP Power Apps
entry.content: Did you get the answer to this as also trying to change the home page.

entry.title: Solman user SM<SID> is running SAPLSU_USER_CHANGE_DOC in sattelite system
entry.content:
Let the quest begin

In our Fiori system We have a dump every one hour with the program SAPLSU_USER_CHANGE_DOC started by the solman user SM_<SID>

One thing is that the report ends with a "TIME_OUT" dump, we can proberly solve that with archiving and/or extending the "maxruntime" param,

Question:
Can you tell me from where in Solman this is trikkered?

entry.title: Re: Object Page in Fiori List Report is blank (Column hea...
entry.content: of course, the annotation you have is not for rendering object page. you need facet annotation https://github.com/SAP-samples/abap-platform-rap100/blob/main/src/zrap100_c_traveltp_sol.ddlx.asddlxs

entry.title: How to set Bank Account ID?
entry.content:
How to set Bank Account ID using the API Journal Entry - Post (Synchronous)?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Change Homepage on SAP Power Apps
entry.content: I have actually figured it out. Within the App, select the "Navigation" option along the top and change the home screen within there.

entry.title: Re: How to set Bank Account ID?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community, 

 

As of now, the API mentioned does not support setting the Bank Account ID, therefore, a Feature Request would be required.

In order to create a feature request please follow the steps below:

 

  1. Get started by opening SAP Customer Influence.
  2. Register and accept the Terms of Use.
  3. Choose a session of your interest.
  4. Create and submit your improvement request.
  5. Take a look at existing improvement requests and start voting and commenting.

 

You can also refer to below KBA for details:

2963059 - How to Submit Feature Requests for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Product

 

I hope this helps!

 

Best Regards,

SAP Product Support

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP external ODATA which does not support skip
entry.content: did you try removing the skip by implementing a "before" handler?

entry.title: Re: Re-approve for approved maintenance order
entry.content: Tim, Thanks for your answer. Could you please elaborate how a 2nd approval can be triggered ? Baseline costs are not available in Display Maintenance Order application and can only be traced from Maintenance costs report, so might not solve the problem we are facing

entry.title: Re: Deactivated workflow for journal entry but validation...
entry.content: Hello Edna,

entry.title: Re: SAP Public Cloud Access using IAS as Proxy but no use...
entry.content: Thank You @Colt for your response. This really helps us to push for the user creation in IAS. I will keep the thread open for a few more days for any additional responses.

entry.title: Re: Deactivated workflow for journal entry but validation...
entry.content:
Hello Edna,

Thanks for your answer.

To be more precise, I used the app "Manage Workflows for Journal Entries in General Ledger" (as below) to deactivate the workflows.

I now see them as "inactive", but when someone submits a journal entry in "Verify General Journal Entries" (as below), the journal entry is requiring a validation.

entry.title: Re: Can GTS transfer future classification to ERP at a fu...
entry.content:
Hi Philip,

yes, what you mentioned should work in SAP standard if you run t-code /SAPSLL/COMCO_RTR / report /SAPSLL/COMCO_RETRANSFER for retransfer into ECC system regularly in background via batch job:

Does the standard solution offer the possibility to transfer to ERP classification which is made for the future? So at the first day of validity (in this case 01/04/2024) of the new classification in GTS, this is automagically transferred to ERP and is ready for use without any intervention from user other than the initial task of classification?
BR
Fabian

entry.title: Re: How to manage prepaid use case in Subscription Billing?
entry.content:
Thanks @Annette for clarification. 

Does it mean, once allowance is fully consumed, SB should notify the source application and if customer does recharge again, a new allowance should be created with the help of customer & product information? Is this understanding, correct?

Also, invoicing happens in SD billing module. How SD will understand that these are prepaid billing events and need not to be considered in invoice document as customer has already paid for it?

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori elements dropdown is listing only 10 records
entry.content:
We're experiencing the same behavior.

We have no solution yet.

Found an annotation 

@Common.ValueListWithFixedValues.@Common.ValueListShowValuesImmediately: true
 
But this leads to a RadioButton Group ?!

 

We want to have a dropdown selection 😉

entry.title: Re: Recruiting - Anonymise candidate name and surname
entry.content:
Hi MforSyth, hope you're doing great.

As you can see on KBA 2946125  , currently there is no feature available to meet this requirement, but there is an active enhancement request on Customer Influence Page with more than 100 votes and that will receive an update on Q4 2024.

Please start to follow this Improvement Request so you'll be able to know when this request will be acknowledged and when it will be implemented by SAP Team.

Regards.

Thiago Eva

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 2 - Words as Ve
entry.content:
Hi,

Here is my Week 2 Submission.

entry.title: how to add on_click event to a Hyperlink in ALV report?
entry.content:
*method prepare_data
IF lt_fu_root IS NOT INITIAL.
              lt_fu_root_temp = lt_fu_root.
              <lfs_output>-tor_id_fu = VALUE #( lt_fu_root_temp[ tor_cat = lc_fu ]-tor_id OPTIONAL ).

* Shipment tracking link
              CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERSION_EXIT_ALPHA_OUTPUT'
                EXPORTING
                  input  = <lfs_output>-tor_id_fu
                IMPORTING
                  output = lv_tor_id_fu_ext.

              " Concatenate the base link with the converted value
              CONCATENATE lc_link lv_tor_id_fu_ext INTO <lfs_output>-tracking_link.
            ENDIF.

I am a newbie in abap, Please help me to add the hyperlink's on click event so that when I click on the hyperlink in the report, it should direct to the browser. I have an existing report where inside method: prepare_data, I am fetching the hyperlink of this field in the final internal table.
Now, in the method: display_alv, 

Please help to add the on_click event here so that when i click on the link in the field "Tracking_link", the urls should be directing to a web browser.

entry.title: Re: Apache spark dataframe jdbc write- how to use table_t...
entry.content:
Not only is HANA 1.0 quite dated, it has been out of maintenance for several years now and isn't even available to download anymore. 

You should be upgrading to HANA 2.0 to be on a current supported version of HANA.

entry.title: Re: how to add on_click event to a Hyperlink in ALV report?
entry.content:
METHOD display_alv.

    DATA: ls_key           TYPE salv_s_layout_key,
          lo_columns       TYPE REF TO cl_salv_columns_table,
          lo_event_handler TYPE REF TO lcl_customs,
          lo_column        TYPE REF TO cl_salv_column_table.

    CONSTANTS: lc_standard TYPE sypfkey VALUE 'STANDARD'.

    IF gt_output IS NOT INITIAL.
      "Preparation for the ALV
      TRY.
          cl_salv_table=>factory(
          IMPORTING
            r_salv_table = DATA(lo_salv_table)        "Salv Object
          CHANGING
            t_table      = gt_output ).         "output
        CATCH cx_salv_msg INTO DATA(lv_message).
          MESSAGE lv_message TYPE gc_succ DISPLAY LIKE gc_err.
      ENDTRY.

      DATA(lo_functions) = lo_salv_table->get_functions( ).
      lo_functions->set_all( abap_true ).

* Get Columns for ALV
      CALL METHOD lo_salv_table->get_columns
        RECEIVING
          value = lo_columns.

      lo_columns->set_optimize( abap_true ).

* Layout
      DATA(lo_layout) = lo_salv_table->get_layout( ).
      lo_layout->set_save_restriction( if_salv_c_layout=>restrict_none ).
      ls_key-report = sy-repid.
      lo_layout->set_key( ls_key ).

* Get column shipment tracking link
      TRY.
lo_columns->get_column( 'TRACKING_LINK'  )->set_short_text( '' ).
      lo_columns->get_column( 'TRACKING_LINK'  )->set_medium_text( '' ).
      lo_columns->get_column( 'TRACKING_LINK'  )->set_long_text( TEXT-059 ).
      lo_column ?= lo_columns->get_column( columnname = 'TRACKING_LINK' ).
      lo_column->set_cell_type( value = if_salv_c_cell_type=>hotspot ).
CATCH cx_salv_not_found INTO DATA(lo_msg).
          MESSAGE : lo_msg->get_longtext( ) TYPE gc_succ DISPLAY LIKE gc_err.
      ENDTRY.

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP external ODATA which does not support skip
entry.content: I tried it in the on handler... but it did not work out, as I do not know what values to reset.

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 2 - Words as Ve
entry.content:
As all words you are using are vegetable names and are in the same category, so the distance between them should be quite short in the latent space and might influence the answers.

I would suggest using words from two different categories, as you can see in other submissions.

entry.title: Re: SAP Signavio Process Managerでべスプラのフローを改良してみる
entry.content:
Thank you for the insightful post on using SAP Signavio with SAP Best Practices! Your clear guide on exporting BPMN files from SAP and importing them into SAP Signavio is very helpful for beginners.

Your tips on customizing flows, adding swimlanes, and creating custom attributes enhance process clarity. The advice on exporting process descriptions and using Word for detailed documentation is practical.

We'd love for you to join our LinkedIn User Group and share more of your knowledge with the community. I look forward to reading your posts!

entry.title: Re: 🇨🇴 Event-driven integrations with SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh (Bogota, Colombia
entry.content: IM ATTENTING, THANKS SAP

entry.title: Re: How to allocate revenue in Plan
entry.content: forwarded to experts

entry.title: Re: Cancel Onboarding in 2.0
entry.content:
Hi Roxanne1, hope you're doing great.

According to the latest ONB Guide, topic "12 - Canceling an Onboarding Process", once you've cancelled the Onboarding for a candidate, you'll have the attached behavior occurring. This attached image was extracted from the implementation guide.

In case the attached description does not fit to your scenario, then please create a document with your scenario details to confirm where your scenario differs from the Implementation Guide, and then reach Product Support Team.

Regards.

Thiago Eva

entry.title: Re: Connecting and Exposing API Endpoint from SAP Cloud Integration-(Part 2) || Connect, Expose & Te
entry.content:
my english not good but try to understand more people get error like faultString and postman console error but the mistake u all made on wjile assign policies first you assign proxyendpoint>preflow 

1, SpikeArrest

2, OAuth2.0

this is not problem but next is slightly diffrent from this

first you need to assign OAuth 2.0 by click preflow 

don't paste that conditional string on that  ,click the + symbol on proxy endpoint

and write a name on flow name OAuthToken  and click on the side here you get a rectangle conditional flow here paste that

(proxy.pathsuffix MatchesPath "/OAuthToken" OR proxy.pathsuffix MatchesPath "/OAuthToken/**" OR proxy.pathsuffix MatchesPath "/OAuthToken(**")AND(request.verb = "POST")

similarly create another tab by click + symbol on proxyendpoint and name that DefaulyFaultFlow And click on side now you get another rectangle tab and here paste that 

proxy.pathsuffix MatchesPath "/OAuthToken" OR proxy.pathsuffix MatchesPath "/OAuthToken/**" OR proxy.pathsuffix MatchesPath "/OAuthToken(**"

Don't Assign RaiseFault on preflow you need to Assign that on this DefaultFaultFlow which is created by  manually by you click on the side of DefaultFaultFlow And Assign RaiseFault

 

 

Here for understanding

preflow = spikearrest,OAuth for first and second OAuth  also for preflow but assign raise fault you need to manually create the conditional flow you have any doubt ask me.

entry.title: Re: RAP Model insert text via text association in managed scenario
entry.content: Hi Christian, can you please show the snippet of your CDS and BDEF? Kind regards

entry.title: Re: SAP Security Configuration Recommendations
entry.content:
Hi @WihemArsac 

The security recommendations are great for reviewing the configuration 🛡.

We would like to download the recommendations and track the implementation locally. For BTP this is easy, because there is a download option on the page. For e.g. SuccessFactors the option is not available. 

I suggest making it possible to download all cloud security recommendations.

Kind regards,
Peter

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 2 - Words as Ve
entry.content:
I have tried an alternative method for the analogy search. At least, for the king/man/queen, it provides woman as expected. Let me know what you think about.
Here is my coding

from hdbcli import dbapi
def parseFvecs(fvecs):
    dim = struct.unpack_from("<I", fvecs, 0)[0]
    return list(struct.unpack_from("<%sf" % str(dim), fvecs, 4))
word1='king'
related_word1='man'
word2='queen'
conn = dbapi.connect(userkey='myDevChallenger')
sql = """SELECT TOP 1 WV FROM "DEVCHALLENGER"."GOOGLE_NEWS" WHERE "WORD"=?"""
cursor = conn.cursor()
cursor.execute(sql,(word1))
word1_vector= parseFvecs(cursor.fetchall()[0][0]) 
cursor.execute(sql,(related_word1))
related_word1_vector= parseFvecs(cursor.fetchall()[0][0]) 
cursor.execute(sql,(word2))
word2_vector= parseFvecs(cursor.fetchall()[0][0]) 
related_word2_vector = []
for word1_item, related_word1_item, word2_item in zip(word1_vector, related_word1_vector,word2_vector):
    related_word2_item = related_word1_item - word1_item + word2_item
    related_word2_vector.append(related_word2_item)
sql = """SELECT "WORD" FROM "DEVCHALLENGER"."GOOGLE_NEWS" ORDER BY COSINE_SIMILARITY(TO_REAL_VECTOR(?),"WV") DESC LIMIT 1"""
cursor.execute(sql,(str(related_word2_vector)))
cursor.fetchall()[0][0]

entry.title: Re: Wrong delivery date - Quote Order to Sales Order
entry.content:
You mean Delivery Date in the Sales Order should be 3 days from Quotation creation. 

How is this determined? 

Was there some Development / Enhancement in ECC that is not activated in S/4? 

Thanks,

Kind Regards
Wihem

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori elements dropdown is listing only 10 records
entry.content:
It seems to be a problem with Fiori Elements / SAPUI5 in version 1.124.x.

With 1.123.x and 1.125.x it's working ...

entry.title: login/min_password_lng" as "14" what is the impact on system and communication users when we change.
entry.content: i have a small query ,currently we have communication users which is RFC , client has asked to change the password length from 8 to 14 , what is the impact on communication users?will it be changed ?or the functions on RFC will hold an error stoping the activities.

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud TDD Scope Item Activation 6W3
entry.content:
Hello Experts,
we are currently trying to activate the scope item 6W3 in our TDD system. Our Problem is that we cant find it during scoping in the CBC. After doing some research we found a spread sheet from SAP, which list the following scope items under the "Required Scope Items and Business Conditions" for 6W3. 
"6W1; 6W2; BD9; BME; 5D2; 5HP"
Does this mean we have to activate these scope items in our system before we can add 6w3 ?
We greatly appreciate any help.

Kind regards
Lukas

entry.title: SAP Digital Manufacturing - backflushing components
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I'm seeking to understand whether DM should display (SFC report) the consumption of components based on backflush triggered by Production Order Yield Confirmation in IM-managed storage locations. My assumption was that confirming an operation would automatically consume all BOM components marked as "backflush enabled." However, I observed that no messages for backflush were generated, and DM does not indicate that backflushing occurred, despite the fact that 261 movements were correctly generated in the S/4HANA system.
I'm using consolidated inventory mode, maybe it is somehow related.

Kind regards,
Blazej 

SAP Digital Manufacturing   @ManoelCosta

entry.title: Re: Call API on Presentation Server using CL_HTTP_CLIENT
entry.content:
Thanks Rossi!

I hadn't thought about this possibility.

I have already used these RFCs with the HTTP_GET and HTTP_POST functions, but never with the CL_HTTP_CLIENT class.
I was a little confused on how I can create the object pointing to the SAPHTTP RFC (create_by_destination?) and set the API service URL.
Can you help me?

entry.title: Re: SBO Mail not working in New installation 10.0 FP2402
entry.content:
Finally:

Installed 10.0 FP2208 - All working without problems.

Upgrade to 10.0 FP2405 - All working without problems.

Installing 10.0 FP2402 or FP2405 from cero sbomailer and alerts not works, workflow presents errors or causes problems

There is nothing included in any note or in any forum or post, but be careful with those versions.

entry.title: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 3 - Image Embeddings
entry.content:
This discussion thread is to submit your solution for Week 3 "Image Embeddings"  if you are participating in the June 2024 developer challenge "Multi-model in SAP HANA Cloud" 🤓

👉Please use this separate thread to ask your questions and discuss issues. Keep this thread for your submissions only.

✌️ Please post your Week 2 "Words as Vectors" submissions here: https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/submissions-for-quot-sap-hana-cloud-multi-model-quot-developer-challenge/td-p/13728400

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Good day, sir.

My name is Sasa Tunde Femi from Nigeria. I identify as someone from a remote or underserved location that lacks access to the same economic opportunities as urban or more privileged areas. I graduated among the top five in my geology class with a strong 2:1. I have been looking to transition to IT to become more employable, but I have not succeeded so far. This is why I am seeking the opportunity to embark on this journey with SAP. Please consider my application and grant me the opportunity to become an SAP consultant. Thank you.

entry.title: About assigning roles to content objects in SAP Enable Now
entry.content:
We have created various content objects in SAP Enable Now Workarea. Now, we want to assign custom roles to these content objects. For example, I want to create assignment for the Sourcing Management course folder, as shown in the picture below.

In SEN, I have created two new custom user roles – Test Role A, and Test Role B. As part of course assignment, I want to assign the Sourcing Management folder to these two custom roles only, instead of assigning it to the generic SEN system role as "Learners".

My Question: System allows me to add only one role to the content folder/object. I mean I can select only one role from the left bucket and display it to the right bucket. Any idea how to add multiple custom roles  to the same content object. Please help.

entry.title: Custom fields, data source, and logic, in short, the "Custom Fields" application in Fiori.
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

This blog provides comprehensive information about the "Custom Fields" or "Custom Fields and Logic" applications available in the SAP S/4HANA Fiori platform. The blog extensively covers topics such as the creation, usage, functionalities in the GUI, transport, import-export, and authorizations of custom fields. Additionally, it includes details on data source usage areas, functionalities in the GUI, import-export, and logic process. The blog addresses the errors encountered during these processes and necessary authorizations.

 

 

Authorizations and Controls

 

Custom Fields and Logic

To utilize the "Custom Fields and Logic" app for creating custom fields, data sources, or logic, the following catalogs and groups need to be added to the role in the "PFCG":

 

SAP_BASIS_BC_EXT:

 

SAP_BASIS_BCG_EXT:

 

SAP_BASIS_TCR_T :

 

After assigning the necessary authorizations, the application will appear on the "App Finder" page. Additionally, the application needs to be added to the group to ensure it is accessible to users who have been granted the required permissions.

 

 

OData Services

The following OData services need to be activated. Controls for this purpose are provided on the page after accessing the "/IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE" transaction

code.

  • APS_CUSTOM_FIELD_MAINTENANCE_SRV
  • APS_DATA_SOURCE_EXTENSION_SRV
  • SBLE_BADI_CTX_REGISTRY_SRV

If the service is not active, it can be activated using the “ICF Node” button. If there is an error in the service or it needs to be edited, assistance can be obtained from the buttons located above.

 

 

ICF nodes

The following services need to be enabled. Service edits are made using the transaction code “SICF”.

component

Technical Name

Path to ICF Node

SAP UI5 Component

SAP UI5 Application

 

NW_APS_EXT_CFL

/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/nw_aps_ext_cfl

 

nw.core.extcfl

 

 

NW_APS_EXT_LIB*

 

/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/nw_aps_ext_lib

 

 

 

NW_APS_LIB*

 

/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/nw_aps_lib

 

 

 

 

                            

Set Adapt UI Button

/UIF/SAP_RTA_PLUGIN:

 

 

Custom Fields and Logic App

With this application:

  • Create data source extensions,
  • Create custom fields,
  • Enable custom database fields for usage in SAP Fiori applications,
  • Create custom logic.

 

 

Custom Fields

In this tab:

-  Create a new field,

-  Edit field,

-  View detailed information for the field,

-  Define business scenariosField assignment to UI or reports,

- Check API and IDOC services,

- Enable for Mail and Form templates.

Note: To run extensibility scenarios end-to-end, the user must have the “ SAP_UI_FLEX_KEY_USER ” role.

 

After entering the business context, type and identifiers, click the " Create and edit " button.

 

With this tab, contexts are added based on the scenario.

 

For example, when a field is created as a service header and extended to an activity scenario, a new field specific to the activity will automatically be created.

 

OData APIs are activated with the “ OData APIs ” tab.

 

SOAP APIs are activated with the “ SOAP APIs ” tab.

 

BAPIs are displayed with the “BAPIs” tab.

 

The forms activated with the “ Form Templates ” tab.

 

 

Using Created Fields

Click the “Show Configurable Areas” button and select the area to which the field will be added.

 

Click the “Show Available Fields” button. The field is selected from the open block and added with the “+” button. Then, use the “Show Field Properties” button to adjust properties.

-To change the position of the field, simply drag and drop it to the desired location within the form,

-To make it mandatory, toggle the corresponding option in the field properties,

-To change the text displayed for the field, you can edit the "Label" property in the field properties.

 

 

 

View custom fields in context

All custom fields within the contexts can be displayed using the “SCFD_REGISTRY” transaction code. For instance, click on the service header.

 

Enter “ CRMS4S_SERV_H_INCL_EEW_PS ”.

 

All published fields appear within this structure.

 

 

Field Change History

Changes to the data of the fields can be checked using the “SCFD_CHANGE_LOG” transaction code.

 

 

Control and Consistency of Objects

The consistency of objects is checked by selecting the following properties using the “SCFD_CHECK_EXT_OBJ” transaction code.

 

Error, checks etc. results look like the following.

 

 

Access and Control of Custom Fields via GUI

Custom fields display and checking are provided with the “SCFD_FIELDVIEWER” transaction code. It includes the following properties and more.

  • Field definition,
  • Enhancement information,
  • Change history,
  • Where is it used?
  • Fiori UI usages,
  • Error information,
  • Version update.
 

 

Export Fields as XML

Export in XML format using the transaction code “SCFD_MD_DOWNLOAD”. Select the desired fields and export them with the "Export Metadata" button.

 

Example export :

 

 

 

Import Fields as XML

Custom fields can be createdorting the XML format file using the transaction code “SCFD_MD_UPLOAD”.

 

 

Field Archive Information

Display archive information for the fields using the transaction code “SCFD_RECOVERY”

 

 

Active-Inactive Properties of Fields Via GUI

Inactive fields can be activated using the “SCFD_EUI” transaction code. If there is an error, its details can be displayed.

 

 

Field Extensibility Information

Details regarding the extensibility of the field can be accessed with the “SCFD_SEARCH” transaction code.

 

 

Transport of Custom Field     

The Configure Software Packages application is used to include the created custom field in the request. The following steps are required for this application:

The "APS_EXT_ATO_PK_CFG_SRV" oData service is added and the user is assigned the "SAP_NW_APS_EXT_ATO_PK_CFG_APP" role. The following services are enabled with the SICF transaction code.

  • /sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/nw_aps_ato_conf
  • /sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/nw_aps_ato_lib
  • /sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/nw_aps_lib  

 

The package is added.

 

The request is selected.

 

After selecting the field, click the "Reassign to Package" button. The field is added to the request.

 

Custom Field Text Table

Click on the data element from the SE11 transaction code.

 

Click on the domain.

 

Open the table in the value table.

 

The table contains texts of field.

 

 

 

Data Source

Data Sources Export/Import Usage Areas:

In SAP Fiori applications, data sources are utilized through various methods. These include OData services, CDS views, SAP Gateway, BAPIs, SAP HANA Calculation Views, RAP, and various backend APIs. These methods enable flexible, powerful, and user-friendly data access solutions in Fiori applications.

 

  1. OData Services

OData (Open Data Protocol) is a widely used protocol for data exchange between SAP Fiori applications and data sources. OData services provide access to the data source and support CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) operations.

 

  1. Core Data Services (CDS)

CDS is an SAP technology used to define data models on SAP HANA. CDS views define the database-based business logic and relationships. These views can be exposed as OData services and used by Fiori applications.

 

  1. SAP Gateway and BAPI (Business Application Programming Interface)

SAP Gateway acts as a middleware to access data in SAP systems. BAPIs are standardized interfaces to business functions in SAP ERP systems.

 

  1. SAP HANA Calculation Views

SAP HANA Calculation Views are used to model data and business logic on SAP HANA. These views can be directly used or exposed as OData services for Fiori applications.

 

  1. RESTful ABAP Programming Model (RAP)

RAP is a model used in modern ABAP development to facilitate the creation and management of OData services. RAP enables integration between Fiori applications and data sources.

 

  1. Backend System APIs

Various SAP systems (e.g., SuccessFactors, Ariba, Concur) provide APIs to access data and business processes. These APIs can be REST or SOAP-based, and Fiori applications can use them to access data sources.

 

A new data source is created using the “Data Source Extensions” tab in the “Custom Fields and Logic” app.

 

 

The fields desired to be included in the data source are added from the "Available Fields" breakdown. The field name can be changed using the "Custom Text" checkbox. Search help is added with the “Value Help” checkbox. It is activated by clicking the “Publish” button.

 

NOTE1: Adding additional standard fields might enable end users to access restricted data in the extended data source, without having the required authorization.

NOTE2: Depending on the field path and the nature of the selected fields, data retrieval might become slower after a data source extension has been added.

NOTE3: Fiori must be restarted after adding a new field to the data source.

 

 

Displaying and Controlling the Data Source via GUI

Data sources are displayed, and detailed access is provided with the “SCFD_DE_COCKPIT” transaction code. It includes the following properties and more.

  • General information,
  • Enhancement information,
  • Change history,
  • Where is it used?
  • Fiori UI usages,
  • Error information,
  • Version update.
 

 

Creating a Data Source with XML

The data source template with XML extension is imported with the “ SCFD_DE_MD_UPLOAD ” transaction code. To download the data source template, it can be with the “ Export Metadata ” button in the “ SCFD_DE_COCKPIT ” transaction code.

 

 

Example XML :

 

After importing, the data source is created by clicking the "Import" button.

Imported XML :

 

 

Logic

With the logic, field-specific rules, error messages, controls, etc. can be defined. These are typically implemented using ABAP. For example, you might select "Service document check before save" to define a check that should be performed before saving a service document.

 

Standard fields are present in the "serviceheader" and "serviceitems" entities, while custom fields are found in the "serviceheader_extension" and "serviceitems_extension" entities.

If the "BOLUM" field is initial, an error message is displayed

 

 There is a message of error type “ CRM_S4_ORDER_MISC ”.

 

 

Errors

 

1-     App stuck on loading

When encountering the issue of the application not opening when clicked, you can check for error details using the browser's developer tools (F12). If it's determined that the error is due to a missing alias in the OData services, you can follow these steps:

Access the transaction code “/IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE” to manage OData services.

Select the relevant service from the list. At the bottom right of the screen, there should be a button to add a system nickname. Click on this button and provide the necessary alias or nickname for the system. Save the changes. By adding the system nickname, you are providing a reference for the OData service, which should resolve the error and allow the application to open properly when clicked.

 

 

To customize fields and logic implementation, buttons for editing, deleting, etc., are missing

To resolve the issue of missing buttons, follow these steps:

Navigate to SIMG > ABAP Platform > Application Server > System Administration > Configuration: Applications in Software Component UI FOR BASIS APPLICATIONS >Set up the Adaptation Transport Organizer and complete the Adaptation Transport Organizer setup with default data on the following page.

 

2-     Getting an error when trying to create logic

 

It has been determined that the reason for the above error is that the virus scanning adaptations are active but not active. Since there is no need for virus scanning, active virus scans have been disabled on the page that appears with the " VSCANPROFILE" transaction code.

 

The virus scan is executed with the profile empty and virus scanning turned off.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA for group reporting - Roadmap Acceleration
entry.content:
--
SAP S/4HANA for group reporting
Roadmap Acceleration

At SAP, we’re fortunate to have one of the best consolidation tools in our portfolio: SAP Financial Consolidation. We’re pleased to confirm that we're accelerating the development of the best features of this software in SAP S/4HANA for group reporting.

Thanks to the feedback from our Financial Consolidation customers, and as part of our "Group Reporting Roadmap Acceleration" initiative, we’re increasing our investments in GRDC (Group Reporting Data Collection). For example, you’ll be able to launch your controls from the package, enter data in multiple periods, import data directly from the package, link documents, monitor the progress of data collection in a completely modernized UI, and publish and integrate your packages when they are valid. We’re also improving manual entries to offer you a Debit-Credit mode presentation.

For automatic consolidation operations, we’re developing a new rule engine in Group Reporting, directly inspired by Financial Consolidation, with all the power and flexibility that Financial Consolidation users appreciate so much.

For reporting, you’ll be able to create and manage your financial statements more simply with Group Reporting’s Review Booklet, enter comments at consolidated level, and benefit from integration with Microsoft Teams to streamline analyses with your consolidation team.

Moreover, we believe that AI will have a major impact on finance software. We’re actively working on integrating generative AI into Group Reporting to support AI-specific scenarios in the consolidation process, embed generative AI in the analysis and reporting of financial data, and process comments at the subsidiary and group level.

More information on the roadmap items mentioned in this article:

  • Launch your controls from the package
  • Enter data in multiple periods
  • Import data directly from the package
  • Link documents 
  • Monitor the progress of data collection in a completely modernized UI
  • Publish and integrate your packages when they are valid.
  • Debit-Credit mode presentation of manual journal entries
  • New consolidation rule engine 
  • Create and manage your financial statements more simply
  • Generative AI
  • Generative AI in the consolidation process
  • Generative AI in the analysis and reporting of financial data

More information on Group Reporting roadmap can be found in the SAP Roadmap Explorer.

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – Yes Key Users can create default app settings for filters, tables, a
entry.content:
Hello App Variant Gurus, 

I have a really irritating issue. When I transport my published app variant, in the target system I get the following message :

App Descriptor for id customer.i2d.eam.order.manages1.id_1717680452078_1853 was not found by App Index search

Message No. /UI2/FDM012

 

It is like the customer.i2D of my variant couldn't be included in the transport....

Any idea?
